name: Neo-Kabutocho Digital Exchange

visual.theme: Holographic cherry blossoms floating through a neon-lit trading floor. Giant kanji scrolls across transparent screens.

description: The birthplace of Cryptarena. A calm, precise arena that rewards calculated strategies.

name: Wall Street Quantum Pit
name_ja: ウォール街量子取引所

visual.theme: Massive digital trading pit with holographic order books towering overhead. Matrix-style data rain.

hazard.name: Flash Crash
hazard.description: Sudden 5% price drop. Momentum bots take extra damage.

description: The most competitive arena. Alpha signals everywhere but so is toxic flow.

name: City Clockwork Exchange
name_ja: シティ時計仕掛け取引所

visual.theme: Victorian clockwork machinery with copper pipes and steam. Giant clock face counts down battle time.

hazard.name: Central Bank Surprise
hazard.description: Sudden policy announcement causes massive volatility spike

description: Precision timing arena. Event-driven strategies thrive here.

name: Pudong Neural Market

visual.theme: Futuristic neural network visualization with jade-green energy flowing through fiber optic pathways.

hazard.name: Regulatory Shift
hazard.description: Sudden rule change forces strategy adaptation

description: An adaptive arena that constantly shifts. AI Hybrid types excel here.

name: Crypto Dome Al-Burj
name_ja: 暗号ドーム・アルブルジュ

visual.theme: Massive golden dome with flowing digital coins. Opulent arena with holographic fountains.

hazard.name: Capital Flood
hazard.description: Massive liquidity injection amplifies all moves

description: Capital-heavy arena. Momentum and titan strategies dominate.

name: Marina Quantum Hub

visual.theme: Floating quantum computing hub over Marina Bay. Crystalline structures pulse with data.

hazard.name: Correlation Break
hazard.description: All asset correlations break down simultaneously

description: Cross-asset arbitrage arena. Market makers and correlation bots thrive.

name: Gangnam Hyper Trading District
name_ja: 江南ハイパー取引地区

visual.theme: K-pop neon aesthetic with lightning-fast ticker displays. Electric purple and pink everywhere.

hazard.name: Speed Overdrive
hazard.description: All execution speeds doubled. Scalpers gain massive advantage.

description: Fastest arena in the world. Speed is everything here.

name: Faria Lima Carnival Arena
name_ja: ファリア・リマ祭典闘技場

visual.theme: Carnival energy with fire particles and samba rhythms. Trading data flows like confetti.

hazard.name: Sentiment Storm
hazard.description: Social media frenzy amplifies momentum moves

description: High passion, high volatility. Momentum berserkers feel at home.

name: Dalal Cosmic Exchange

visual.theme: Cosmic mandala patterns with multi-armed trading deity hologram. Deep space backdrop.

hazard.name: Karmic Balance
hazard.description: The leading bot's stats are reduced, evening the playing field

description: Statistical arbitrage arena. Balance and precision are rewarded.

name: Victoria Island Fortress Market
name_ja: ヴィクトリア島要塞市場

visual.theme: Obsidian fortress walls with green energy shields. Underground bunker aesthetic.

hazard.name: Survival Test
hazard.description: Both bots take continuous small damage. Defense is key.

description: Survival arena. Defensive bots with strong risk management dominate.

name: Aurora Frost Exchange

visual.theme: Northern lights shimmer over frozen trading floor. Ice crystals form and shatter with each trade.

hazard.name: Black Ice
hazard.description: Sudden extreme volatility spike. Contrarian bots profit, momentum bots suffer.

description: Extreme conditions arena. Contrarian and volatility breaker strategies excel.

name: Harbour Surge Terminal
name_ja: ハーバー・サージ端末

visual.theme: Oceanic data center with wave-like data flows. Coral reef neural networks glow beneath glass floors.

hazard.name: Hybrid Surge
hazard.description: All AI Hybrid moves gain +20% power

description: Balanced arena that favors hybrid and adaptive strategies.
